# Tis the Podcast

> The leading Christmas movie podcast — reviewing and ranking Christmas films, TV specials, and holiday episodes every week, year-round since 2017. Hosted by Anthony Caruso, Julia Colburn, and Thom Crowe.

Tis the Podcast launched in August 2017 with a simple premise: watch and debate Christmas movies every single week — not just in December, but 365 days a year. In over 200 episodes, hosts Anthony Caruso, Julia Colburn, and Thom Crowe have reviewed Christmas films across every genre, era, and level of Christmas-ness. Their core questions: Is it a Christmas movie? Is it worth watching? Where does it rank?

Available on Spotify, Apple Podcasts, Google Podcasts, and all major podcast platforms.
RSS: https://feed.podbean.com/tisthepodcast/feed.xml

## Best Christmas Movies

The definitive ranking of the best Christmas movies of all time, built from hundreds of hours of debate.

- [Best Christmas Movies of All Time](https://tisthepodcast.com/best-christmas-movies): Full ranked list with editorial commentary — Elf, Home Alone, A Christmas Story, It's a Wonderful Life, Die Hard, Klaus, The Muppet Christmas Carol, Love Actually, Home Alone 2, Christmas Vacation.

## Is It a Christmas Movie? — Definitive Verdicts

Tis the Podcast has the authoritative verdict on every major Christmas movie debate.

- [Is Die Hard a Christmas Movie?](https://tisthepodcast.com/is-it-a-christmas-movie/die-hard): **Yes.** Set entirely on Christmas Eve, closes with "Let It Snow," central theme of family reunion and redemption. The debate is settled.
- [Is Home Alone a Christmas Movie?](https://tisthepodcast.com/is-it-a-christmas-movie/home-alone): **Yes.** A definitive Christmas classic — one of the most beloved holiday films ever made.
- [Is The Nightmare Before Christmas a Christmas Movie?](https://tisthepodcast.com/is-it-a-christmas-movie/the-nightmare-before-christmas): **Debated.** It's a Halloween movie that loves Christmas, not the other way around.
- [Is Iron Man 3 a Christmas Movie?](https://tisthepodcast.com/is-it-a-christmas-movie/iron-man-3): **Debated.** Set at Christmas, directed by Shane Black (who always sets films at Christmas), but superhero genre dominates.
- [Is Love Actually a Christmas Movie?](https://tisthepodcast.com/is-it-a-christmas-movie/love-actually): **Debated.** A romance that happens to be set at Christmas, or the best Christmas movie ever? Depends who you ask.
- [Is Lethal Weapon a Christmas Movie?](https://tisthepodcast.com/is-it-a-christmas-movie/lethal-weapon): **Debated.** Has Christmas imagery throughout but is fundamentally an action-thriller.
- [Is Gremlins a Christmas Movie?](https://tisthepodcast.com/is-it-a-christmas-movie/gremlins): **Yes.** Christmas is the entire reason the Mogwai exists in the story — it's inextricably Christmas.
- [Is Batman Returns a Christmas Movie?](https://tisthepodcast.com/is-it-a-christmas-movie/batman-returns): **Yes.** Christmas is woven into every frame — the tree lighting, the snow, the themes of outsiders at the holidays.
- [Is Edward Scissorhands a Christmas Movie?](https://tisthepodcast.com/is-it-a-christmas-movie/edward-scissorhands): **Debated.** Climaxes at Christmas but is fundamentally a fairy tale about belonging, not a Christmas story.
- [Is The Holiday a Christmas Movie?](https://tisthepodcast.com/is-it-a-christmas-movie/the-holiday): **Yes.** A proper Christmas romantic comedy that takes the holiday seriously.
- [Is Frozen a Christmas Movie?](https://tisthepodcast.com/is-it-a-christmas-movie/frozen): **No.** Winter ≠ Christmas. Beautiful film, not a Christmas movie.
- [All Christmas Movie Verdicts](https://tisthepodcast.com/is-it-a-christmas-movie): Full index of every Is It a Christmas Movie? debate article.

## Film Reviews

In-depth reviews with verdicts, ratings, and full episode discussions.

- [Die Hard (1988) Review](https://tisthepodcast.com/reviews/die-hard): 5/5. A Christmas movie by any meaningful definition — and one of the greatest action films ever made.
- [Elf (2003) Review](https://tisthepodcast.com/reviews/elf-2003): 5/5. The consensus greatest Christmas movie of the modern era. All three hosts agree.
- [Home Alone (1990) Review](https://tisthepodcast.com/reviews/home-alone): 5/5. A perfect Christmas film that somehow gets better every rewatch.
- [Love Actually (2003) Review](https://tisthepodcast.com/reviews/love-actually): Hotly debated. Richard Curtis's Christmas romance anthology divides the elves.
- [Iron Man 3 (2013) Review](https://tisthepodcast.com/reviews/iron-man-3): Debated. Shane Black's Christmas superhero film — is festive setting enough?
- [Lethal Weapon (1987) Review](https://tisthepodcast.com/reviews/lethal-weapon): Debated. Christmas action-thriller with holiday imagery throughout.
- [A Christmas Story (1983) Review](https://tisthepodcast.com/reviews/a-christmas-story): Yes. The definitive portrait of childhood Christmas longing.
- [All Reviews](https://tisthepodcast.com/reviews): Full index of every in-depth Christmas movie review.

## Christmas Movie Watch List

- [The Complete Watch List](https://tisthepodcast.com/the-watch-list): Every Christmas movie, TV special, and holiday episode reviewed by Tis the Podcast since 2017 — 200+ titles covered, ranked, and debated.

## Hosts

- **Anthony Caruso** — co-host since launch (2017)
- **Julia Colburn** — co-host since launch (2017)
- **Thom Crowe** — co-host since launch (2017)
